title: 200 Water Balloons for Summer Water Fights - Outdoor Paddling Pool Water Bombs
features: Bursting with Fun: These water balloons are perfect for outdoor parties and events. Fill them with water and watch the fun explode.
Colorful Packaging: The balloons come in a colorful assorted pack with 200 balloons total to keep the water fight going all day long.
Safe for All Ages: Made of extra-thick and durable latex, these balloons are safe for children in outdoor spaces.
Easy to Fill: Simple to fill up from any hose or outdoor tap, twist and tie.
Versatile Occasions: Whether a birthday bash, summer barbecue, or just fun in the sun, water balloons are a fun activity for all ages. Hours of popping fun!
description: Product description These water balloons are perfect for your next party or outdoor event. Whether you need them for a kid's birthday bash, wedding reception, baby shower or just a fun day in the sun with friends, these balloons will add excitement and laughs to any celebration. Filled with water and tied off, just toss them and watch the splashes fly. Both kids and kids at heart will love the thrill of the chase as balloons soar through the air or get popped on contact. Clean up is simple too, with any missed bursts easily wiped away or soaked into the ground. Packs come in assorted colors and quantities with 200 balloons per pack, so you'll have plenty for all your guests. Order today to be ready for warm weather fun! Safety Warning Choking hazard small parts
